title: HilbertBench Trace Manifest
description: Root manifest describing a HilbertBench trace. Contains metadata, lifecycle state, intent mode, and integrity guarantees. Does NOT contain execution events.

hbtrace_version.description: Schema version. v1.x guarantees immutability of core (Bucket A) fields.

trace_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this trace. Must match all spans in the event stream.

mode.description: Passive: observation only, zero additional executions. Active: controlled sampling explicitly authorized by user.

timestamp_start.description: UTC time in nanoseconds when recording began.

timestamp_end.description: UTC time in nanoseconds when recording completed. Null indicates abnormal termination.

status.description: Final lifecycle state of the trace.

client_environment.description: Execution environment metadata for reproducibility and debugging. Not part of physical evidence.

frameworks.description: Installed frameworks and versions. Informational only.

integrity_seal.description: Integrity proof of the trace. Null if sealing did not complete.

event_stream_checksum.description: SHA-256 hash of the event stream file.

artifact_count.description: Total number of artifacts referenced by the trace.

tags.description: User-defined metadata for organization. No semantic meaning.
